status.note: qa_findings[] will be populated and this file re-committed when the UI QA swarm completes.

live_symptom: App 'borks' shortly after launch on the desktop. User picked failure mode 'Loads, then errors'. Suspected auto-analyze dying on a config-resolution trap during the Book-a-Set flow.

items.summary: boot() defaults to renderPlay() (index.html:146,614). On a fresh box there is no config, so residents()->taste_readiness()->ensure_config() raises 'earcrate is not configured yet' (app.py:970-972). The 'Book a set' button (index.html:249) has NO config guard; clicking it runs one_click_taste_mix -> ensure_config() raises -> caught into status.last_error (app.py:5225-5227) -> user sees red 'not configured' on Activity. This is the borked first minute.

configure() WRITES the workspace pointer to visible_app_dir() (app.py:539) but load_config_if_present() READS by scanning pointer_search_dirs() (app.py:448-449), which depends on how the process was started (util.py:90-106). When they disagree, setup succeeds but the next launch via a different entry point cannot find the pointer -> config stays None -> all downstream throws 'not configured'. MILESTONES.md:46-47 records this exact defect.

_valid_pointer() returns None if master_root does not exist on disk (app.py:470-471). A correctly-persisted config silently fails to load if the music drive is unmounted or the folder renamed; UI then lies 'not configured' instead of 'your music folder moved'.

key_insight: 'Book a set' (bookSet index.html:280 -> POST /api/one_click_bg server.py:301 -> one_click_taste_mix app.py:3300) is ALREADY the entire pipeline: doctor -> scan -> fail-fast harvest loop (analyze -> extract_loops -> build_ear_crate until taste_readiness().ready, app.py:3336-3363) -> build_compatibility_graph -> propose_taste_mashup -> execute_manifest. The 'JAM button' the owner remembers is this. The vertical-slice engine exists; the work is gating it behind a readiness UI and turning refusals into guidance.

readiness_ledger_rows.name: Environment OK
readiness_ledger_rows.gap: doctor() opens with ensure_config() app.py:1353 so it cannot report ffmpeg-missing pre-config; split env checks from root checks

jam_preconditions.source: doctor().ok (app.py:1389); ffmpeg/ffprobe present app.py:1355-1356; roots writable
taste_readiness().ready == true, failures[] empty (app.py:2839); per-role have>=need from readiness_need() plan/math.py:49
preflight().ready over approved loop pool (app.py:3441); guards 'No approved loops' app.py:3451

roadmap.title: First-run routing to Setup + persistent Ledger UI
Config-resolution trap fixes (A: write pointer to all read-dirs; B: degraded source_missing state)
roadmap.effect: Durable reliability fix; without it steps 1-3 intermittently report 'not configured'

roadmap.effect: The 'walk them through setup' half of the vision

desktop_verification.how: Run Debug-EarCrate.cmd (sets EARCRATE_DEBUG=<repo>\earcrate_debug.log, opens app + live-tail monitor window).
desktop_verification.confirm_root_cause: Reproduce 'Book a set'. Expect 'POST 500 ...ms /api/one_click_bg' and an ERROR block whose traceback contains 'earcrate is not configured yet' -> confirms first_run_dead_end / config trap. If the trace is something else, it is a NEW bug not covered here.
desktop_verification.debug_log_seam: earcrate/ui/server.py:35-76 (_DebugLog, EARCRATE_DEBUG-gated, token redacted, off by default).
